title: tribulocarpus dimorphanthus
intro: Tribulocarpus dimorphanthus, also known as the Puncture Vine or Goat's Head, is a plant with edible fruit and medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids and glycosides that have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. Tribulocarpus dimorphanthus has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and impotence due to its potential sedative and aphrodisiac properties. It has also been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
